UpdateRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdateRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.sourceIp: Inbound rule IP address; mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId
UpdateRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.sourceGroupId: Inbound rule security group ID; mutually exclusive with sourceIp
UpdateRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.destIp: Outbound rule IP address; mutually exclusive with destGroupId
UpdateRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.destGroupId: Outbound rule security group ID; mutually exclusive with destIp
UpdateRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.protocol: Protocol; conversion from TCP/UDP to ICMP is not currently supported
